## Summary

Describe the intent of the change and the user-facing or operational outcome.

## What changed

- Explain the main implementation changes.
- Keep the list concise and concrete.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` when the change affects infrastructure-backed paths

## Risks/Notes

- Call out rollout notes, follow-ups, or anything reviewers should double-check.
